title: WhatsApp Symbols: Copy & Paste Status & Bio Characters
meta_description: Copy and paste WhatsApp symbols for your status, bio, and group names — ticks, hearts, stars, and decorative characters. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Ticks, hearts, stars, and decorations for WhatsApp statuses, bios, and group names. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: WhatsApp symbols dress up the parts of the app that plain text leaves bare — your About line, status updates, group names, and broadcast messages. This library collects the characters people paste into WhatsApp most: check-mark ticks, hearts in every colour, stars and sparkles, plus dividers and ready-made status decorations. Everything here is standard Unicode, so it renders on both Android and iPhone without extra apps.

sections.label: Ticks
sections.intro: Tick characters echo WhatsApp's famous delivery ticks and work great in to-do statuses and group rules.

sections.label: Hearts
sections.intro: Heart characters for couple statuses, anniversary messages, and family group names.

sections.label: Stars
sections.intro: Stars and sparkle characters that make an About line or status headline stand out.

sections.label: Decorations
sections.intro: Structure a long status or group description with bullets, arrows, and divider characters.

sections.label: Popular Emoji
sections.intro: The emojis most often pasted into WhatsApp statuses, captions, and reply reactions.

sections.label: Status Combos
sections.intro: One-click status and bio decorations — each button copies the whole combo string at once.
